notes.processing_time_rule: adjusted_processing_time equals original MK base_processing_time for every SRU.
notes.processing_cost_rule: unit_processing_cost depends only on base_machine_id and is identical across all SRUs.
notes.machine_cost_rule: Machine cost is inverse-normalized from the source MK instance mean processing time to [5.0, 12.0], rounded to 2 decimals.
notes.cross_chain_penalty_rule: 2VC symmetric fixed cross-chain penalty; variable rate is always 0.
notes.mechanism_design: Integrated mechanism instance: high-workload jobs within each service type are assigned to VC1 with ratio=0.75, creating U1/U2 intra-chain congestion. Cross-chain SRUs then use adjusted_processing_time = round(original * 0.75) with moderate transport and fixed costs. The instance is designed to test whether cross-chain scheduling can both release overloaded intra-chain SRUs and exploit cross-chain time advantage.
notes.value_chain_load_ratio_policy: mk01-mk05=0.70, mk06-mk10=0.75, mk11-mk15=0.80, applied independently within each service type.
